steps.title: Find volume from density
steps.content:
Apply the density formula: $\text{Density} = \frac{\text{Mass}}{\text{Volume}}$
Solving for volume: $\text{Volume} = \frac{\text{Mass}}{\text{Density}} = \frac{345}{353} \approx 0.9773 \text{ m}^3$

steps.title: Find edge length and round
steps.content:
For a cube, $s^3 = \text{Volume}$. Substituting:
$$s^3 = 0.9773$$
$$s = \sqrt[3]{0.9773} \approx 0.9924$$
Rounding to the nearest hundredth: 0.9924 → 0.99
That confirms B is correct.
